subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is peerless in majesty and unique in mercy and compassion, and may peace and blessings rest upon the Most Excellent One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لمن تفرد بالعظمه و توحد بالرحمه و الرافه و الصلوه و السلام علی خیر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
